creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Melissa Pilgrim from comment #5)
> (In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #3)
> 
> I can't find the part of the Porter's Handbook that describes what's needed
> for QA logs, but attachment 162083 [details] is the output of portlint -a. 
> I hope that's what is wanted?  If you want poudriere output, I'll get to
> that this weekend.

There is no such thing as a rule in the porter's handbook about attaching poudriere build logs, or portlint output to a bug report. Simply stating "builds fine on 9/10" or something is enough.
